query:
SELECT ticker, companyName, currentPrice, ytdPerformance, dividendYield, portfolioWeight
FROM stocks 
WHERE ticker IN ('ADEN.SW', 'AMGN') 
OR companyName LIKE '%Adecco%' 
OR companyName LIKE '%Amgen%'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, companyName, currentPrice, ytdPerformance, dividendYield, portfolioWeight
FROM stocks 
WHERE ticker IN ('ADEN.SW', 'AMGN') 
OR companyName LIKE '%Adecco%' 
OR companyName LIKE '%Amgen%'
